org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.database.support.AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider

Packages that use AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.database.support
Support classes for database-specific Spring Cloud Task repository implementations.

  • Uses of AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider in org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.database.support

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    SqlPagingQueryUtils.buildSortClause(AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider provider)
    Generates ORDER BY attributes based on the sort keys.
    static void
    SqlPagingQueryUtils.buildWhereClause(AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider provider, boolean remainingPageQuery, StringBuilder sql)
    Generates WHERE clause for queries that require sub selects.
    static String
    SqlPagingQueryUtils.generateLimitJumpToQuery(AbstractSqlPagingQueryProvider provider, String limitClause)
    Generate SQL query string using a LIMIT clause.
